title: AMD is investing $5 billion in Anthropic and deploying 2 gigawatts of Helios GPUs to run Claude
excerpt: AMD and Anthropic announced a strategic partnership on Tuesday that commits AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic and deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in Helios rackscale solutions to run Claude. Deployment of the first gigawatt begins in the first half of 2027. Anthropic is already using […]
content_html:
TL;DR

AMD will invest up to $5B in Anthropic and deploy 2GW of MI450 GPUs. Claude will accelerate ROCm development. First GW ships H1 2027. Anthropic already uses MI355X GPUs.

AMD and Anthropic announced a strategic partnership on Tuesday that commits AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic and deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in Helios rackscale solutions to run Claude. Deployment of the first gigawatt begins in the first half of 2027. Anthropic is already using AMD’s MI355X GPUs and will now scale to MI455X accelerators paired with EPYC “Venice” CPUs and Pensando networking.

The engineering collaboration may matter more than the hardware. AMD and Anthropic will use Claude to optimise workloads for AMD Instinct GPUs and accelerate ROCm software development. AMD will also adopt Claude broadly across its engineering and product development teams. ROCm is AMD’s answer to Nvidia’s CUDA, and its software gap has been the primary reason AI developers default to Nvidia hardware even when AMD’s specs are competitive. If Claude can materially improve ROCm’s developer experience, AMD addresses the problem that has held it back for years, using its customer’s AI to fix its own software.

Anthropic’s compute strategy is now genuinely multi-vendor. Anthropic signed its biggest compute deal with Google and Broadcom, and has separate arrangements with Amazon (Trainium chips, 5GW), CoreWeave (Nvidia GPUs), and SpaceX (Colossus data centres). Adding 2GW of AMD Helios gives Anthropic what Tom Brown, its chief compute officer, called the ability to “map the right workloads to the right hardware.” Diversifying away from any single chip vendor reduces dependency risk at a time when compute is the binding constraint on frontier model development.

For AMD, the $5 billion equity investment mirrors Nvidia’s playbook. Nvidia invested $2 billion in Nebius and has taken stakes in multiple AI infrastructure companies to lock in hardware demand. AMD is doing the same: investing in a customer to guarantee that its chips, not Nvidia’s, run a meaningful share of the world’s most capable AI models. Lisa Su called it “a major platform for the next generation of AI infrastructure.” Whether Helios can compete with Nvidia’s NVL72 at production scale is the question the first gigawatt will answer.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR

AMD 将向 Anthropic 投资高达 50 亿美元，并部署 2GW 的 MI450 GPU。 Claude 将加速 ROCm 的发展。 第一批 GW 将于 2027 年上半年发货。 Anthropic 已经使用 MI355X GPU。

AMD 和 Anthropic 周二宣布建立战略合作伙伴关系，AMD 承诺向 Anthropic 投资高达 50 亿美元，并在 Helios 机架规模解决方案中部署高达 2 吉瓦的 AMD Instinct MI450 系列 GPU 来运行 Claude。 第一个千兆瓦的部署将于 2027 年上半年开始。 Anthropic 已经在使用 AMD 的 MI355X GPU，现在将扩展到与 EPYC“Venice”CPU 和 Pensando 网络搭配的 MI455X 加速器。

工程协作可能比硬件更重要。 AMD 和 Anthropic 将使用 Claude 来优化 AMD Instinct GPU 的工作负载并加速 ROCm 软件开发。 AMD 还将在其工程和产品开发团队中广泛采用 Claude。 ROCm 是 AMD 对 Nvidia CUDA 的回应，其软件差距一直是人工智能开发人员默认使用 Nvidia 硬件的主要原因，即使 AMD 的规格具有竞争力。 如果 Claude 能够实质性地改善 ROCm 的开发人员体验，AMD 就可以利用客户的人工智能来修复自己的软件，从而解决多年来阻碍其发展的问题。

Anthropic 的计算策略现在是真正的多供应商。 Anthropic 与 Google 和 Broadcom 签署了最大的计算协议，并与 Amazon（Trainium 芯片，5GW）、CoreWeave（Nvidia GPU）和 SpaceX（Colossus 数据中心）达成了单独的协议。 添加 2GW 的 AMD Helios 使 Anthropic 能够“将正确的工作负载映射到正确的硬件”，其首席计算官汤姆·布朗 (Tom Brown) 如此评价。 当计算成为前沿模型开发的约束约束时，远离任何单一芯片供应商的多元化可以降低依赖风险。

对于 AMD 来说，50 亿美元的股权投资反映了 Nvidia 的策略。 英伟达向 Nebius 投资了 20 亿美元，并入股了多家人工智能基础设施公司，以锁定硬件需求。 AMD 也在做同样的事情：投资客户以保证其芯片（而不是 Nvidia 的芯片）运行世界上最强大的人工智能模型的有意义的份额。 苏丽莎称其为“下一代人工智能基础设施的主要平台”。 Helios 能否在量产规模上与 Nvidia 的 NVL72 竞争，这是第一个千兆瓦将回答的问题。
